title: Add standard image comparison metrics, tolerance-based compare, and difference image generation
body:
Surveyed ImageMagick, .NET MAUI `VisualTestUtils.MagickNet`, and other image comparison libraries to identify commonly-provided features missing from `SKPixelComparer`.

### New metrics on `SKPixelComparisonResult`

- `SumSquaredError` (long) — raw Σ(ΔR² + ΔG² + ΔB²)
- `MeanAbsoluteError` — per-channel MAE, range [0, 255]
- `MeanSquaredError` — per-channel MSE
- `RootMeanSquaredError` — RMSE (the metric MAUI's `MagickNetVisualComparer` uses)
- `NormalizedRootMeanSquaredError` — RMSE / 255, range [0, 1] for threshold checks
- `PeakSignalToNoiseRatio` — PSNR in dB

### Tolerance-based comparison

Like ImageMagick's `fuzz` — a uniform per-pixel threshold without needing a full mask image. Overloads for all input types (file paths, `SKImage`, `SKBitmap`, `SKPixmap`).

```csharp
// Ignore pixels where total |ΔR|+|ΔG|+|ΔB| ≤ 10
var result = SKPixelComparer.Compare(expected, actual, tolerance: 10);
```

### Per-channel difference image

`GenerateDifferenceImage` produces actual RGB difference values per pixel (vs. `GenerateDifferenceMask` which is binary B/W). Similar to ImageMagick's `compare` output.

```csharp
using var diff = SKPixelComparer.GenerateDifferenceImage(expected, actual);
// diff pixel RGB = absolute per-channel differences
```

### Backward compatibility

Old 3-param `SKPixelComparisonResult` constructor preserved as an overload delegating to the new 4-param constructor.

### Tests

22 new tests covering metrics correctness, tolerance filtering, difference image output, and edge cases.
